hooks.command: PROMPT="$CLAUDE_USER_CONTENT"; BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if echo "$BRANCH" | grep -q '^design/'; then echo '<system-reminder>DESIGN BRANCH DETECTED: Follow .agent/SOPs/design_to_dev_workflow.md and .agent/Tasks/TEMPLATE_design_prd.md. Use PrimeNG components (NOT directives), dark mode surface colors, data-testid on interactive elements, standalone components with signals, @if/@for control flow. Mock data goes in __fixtures__/.</system-reminder>'; elif echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE 'scaffold|new domain|create lib|new entity|criar dominio|nova lib|nova entidade'; then echo '<system-reminder>SCAFFOLD DETECTED: Use /scaffold command or @domain-scaffolder. Must create: domain + data-access + data-source + feature. Follow architecture-knowledge/11-MONOREPO-ARCHITECTURE.md. Required tags: type: + scope:. Update tsconfig.base.json paths.</system-reminder>'; elif echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE 'migrate|migrar|upgrade pattern|modernize|modernizar|convert ngIf|convert to signals'; then echo '<system-reminder>MIGRATION DETECTED: Use /migrate command or @migration-assistant. Consult architecture-knowledge/12-FRONTEND-PATTERNS.md for modern Angular patterns. Key: NgModules->standalone, *ngIf->@if, decorators->functions, BehaviorSubject->signals.</system-reminder>'; elif echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE 'implement|criar|adicionar|refactor|nx g|gerar|build|develop'; then echo '<system-reminder>IMPLEMENTATION DETECTED: Read .agent/System/libs_architecture_pattern.md and .agent/System/base_rules.md before implementing. Use Facade Pattern, standalone components, direct imports.</system-reminder>'; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit' || exit 0; BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null); ANY_COUNT=0; if [ -n "$STAGED" ]; then ANY_COUNT=$(echo "$STAGED" | xargs grep -l ': any' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); fi; if [ "$ANY_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo "<system-reminder>TYPE SAFETY WARNING: $ANY_COUNT staged file(s) contain ': any'. Consider replacing with proper types before commit. Run /type-audit to see details.</system-reminder>"; fi; if echo "$BRANCH" | grep -q '^design/'; then echo 'Design branch: Running lint + build...'; npx nx affected:lint --base=HEAD~1 2>/dev/null && npx nx affected:build --base=HEAD~1 2>/dev/null || { echo 'Lint/Build failed! Fix before committing.'; exit 2; }; elif echo "$BRANCH" | grep -q '^feature/'; then if git diff --cached --name-only | xargs grep -l "throw new Error('TODO')" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: Found throw new Error(TODO) in staged files.'; exit 2; fi; npx nx affected:lint --base=HEAD~1 2>/dev/null && npx nx affected:test --base=HEAD~1 2>/dev/null && npx nx affected:build --base=HEAD~1 2>/dev/null || { echo 'Validation failed!'; exit 2; }; else npx nx affected:lint --base=HEAD~1 2>/dev/null && npx nx affected:test --base=HEAD~1 2>/dev/null && npx nx affected:build --base=HEAD~1 2>/dev/null || { echo 'Validation failed!'; exit 2; }; fi; exit 0

PLANS_DIR="${CLAUDE_WORKING_DIRECTORY}/.agent/Plans"; TASKS_DIR="${CLAUDE_WORKING_DIRECTORY}/.agent/Tasks"; mkdir -p "$TASKS_DIR"; PLAN=$(find "$PLANS_DIR" -maxdepth 1 -name '*.md' -type f ! -name 'README*' -mmin -5 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$PLAN" ]; then NAME=$(basename "$PLAN" .md | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | tr ' ' '_' | tr -cd '[:alnum:]_-'); PRD_ID="PRD-$(date +%Y-%m)-001"; PRD_FILE="$TASKS_DIR/${PRD_ID}_${NAME}.md"; echo "<system-reminder>"; echo "PLAN APPROVED - PRD Creation"; echo ""; echo "Plan file: $PLAN"; echo "Create PRD at: $PRD_FILE"; echo ""; echo "Next steps:"; echo "1. Use Task tool with sub-agents to investigate context"; echo "2. Create structured PRD following .agent/Tasks/README.md template"; echo "3. Archive plan to .agent/Plans/archive/"; echo ""; echo "Recommended agents:"; echo "- Explore: Codebase patterns"; echo "- Plan: Architecture validation"; echo "- general-purpose with @ux-researcher: User needs (if UI)"; echo "</system-reminder>"; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.component\.ts$' || exit 0; ISSUES=''; grep -q 'NgModule' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="${ISSUES} [NgModule]"; grep -qE '@Input\(' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="${ISSUES} [@Input]"; grep -qE '@Output\(' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="${ISSUES} [@Output]"; grep -q 'BehaviorSubject' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="${ISSUES} [BehaviorSubject]"; grep -q '\*ngIf\|\*ngFor' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="${ISSUES} [legacy-directives]"; [ -z "$ISSUES" ] && exit 0; echo "<system-reminder>COMPONENT PATTERN VIOLATION in $(basename "$FILE"):${ISSUES} - Must use: standalone, input()/output(), signals, @if/@for. Ref: architecture-knowledge/12-FRONTEND-PATTERNS.md</system-reminder>"; exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.ts$' || exit 0; BARREL=$(grep -cE "from '(@[a-z]+/[a-z-]+)'" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); [ "$BARREL" = '0' ] || [ -z "$BARREL" ] && exit 0; echo "<system-reminder>BARREL IMPORT WARNING in $(basename "$FILE"): $BARREL barrel import(s) detected. Prefer direct imports: @scope/lib/path/file instead of @scope/lib. Ref: barrel_best_practices.md</system-reminder>"; exit 0
